readiness_boundary.reason: daily deployability is available, while public exposure and formal production hardening remain gated or planned

hardening_tracks.label: Public exposure
guardrails: localhost public origin remains a blocker for public exposure
placeholder secrets remain blockers for public exposure
security review, onboarding check, and published-image dry-run must be visible before real exposure
remaining_work: run public-stack security review before opening edge routes
keep localhost public origin and placeholder secrets as blockers

hardening_tracks.label: Billing production readiness
guardrails: billing can be visible to operators without being presented as default production-ready
billing production gates belong in the platform owning repository
remaining_work: finish billing production gates before presenting billing as a default-ready surface

hardening_tracks.label: Email transport production readiness
guardrails: email transport readiness must remain separate from daily local deployability
email transport gates belong in the owning client repository
remaining_work: finish email transport and marketplace production gates before claiming public production readiness

hardening_tracks.label: Marketplace production readiness
guardrails: marketplace readiness is not implied by local daily deployability
marketplace gates must be proven in the owning formal repositories
remaining_work: finish email transport and marketplace production gates before claiming public production readiness

hardening_tracks.label: Formal package and image release
guardrails: formal npm and image release gates stay in the owning repositories
the fourth repo certifies compatible source combinations, not formal package or image releases
remaining_work: keep formal npm/image release gates in the owning repositories

steps.label: Prove public exposure gate
blocked_by: run public-stack security review before opening edge routes
keep localhost public origin and placeholder secrets as blockers
guardrails: localhost public origin remains a blocker for public exposure
placeholder secrets remain blockers for public exposure
security review, onboarding check, and published-image dry-run must be visible before real exposure
steps.done_when: public-stack security review, onboarding contract check, and published-image dry-run are all visible

steps.label: Define billing production gate
blocked_by: finish billing production gates before presenting billing as a default-ready surface
guardrails: billing can be visible to operators without being presented as default production-ready
billing production gates belong in the platform owning repository
steps.done_when: billing production acceptance evidence is owned by repos/platform and visible without making billing default-ready

steps.label: Define email transport production gate
blocked_by: finish email transport and marketplace production gates before claiming public production readiness
guardrails: email transport readiness must remain separate from daily local deployability
email transport gates belong in the owning client repository
steps.done_when: email transport production acceptance evidence is owned by repos/client and remains separate from local deployability

steps.label: Define marketplace readiness gate
blocked_by: finish email transport and marketplace production gates before claiming public production readiness
guardrails: marketplace readiness is not implied by local daily deployability
marketplace gates must be proven in the owning formal repositories
steps.done_when: marketplace readiness is proven in formal owning repositories before being shown as production-ready

steps.label: Define formal release gate
blocked_by: keep formal npm/image release gates in the owning repositories
guardrails: formal npm and image release gates stay in the owning repositories
the fourth repo certifies compatible source combinations, not formal package or image releases
steps.done_when: npm package and image release gates remain in the owning repositories

steps.label: Export management evidence
guardrails: management evidence is read-only
do not print secret values
do not treat daily deployability as formal production readiness
steps.done_when: operator and dashboard surfaces can display production gaps, owners, guardrails, and next commands without claiming production readiness

guardrails: do not treat daily deployability as formal production readiness
formal production gates belong in the owning repositories
the fourth repo may expose management metadata but must not define business runtime truth
keep public exposure, billing, email transport, marketplace, and release gates independently visible

safety_defaults: deployability production hardening review is read-only and does not read .env files directly
deployability production hardening review only calls read-only roadmap metadata
deployability production hardening review does not call Docker, bind ports, or probe network endpoints
JSON output separates daily deployability from public exposure and formal production readiness without printing secret values
notes: use this when a management surface needs to explain why daily deployability is not production readiness
hardening tracks are convenience projections over existing roadmap metadata; they do not execute commands
